mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.member_id, w.product_id, w.created_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM wishlists w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.id = #{id}

SELECT w.id, w.member_id, w.product_id, w.created_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM wishlists w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} AND w.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT w.id, w.member_id, w.product_id, w.created_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM wishlists w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC

SELECT w.id, w.member_id, w.product_id, w.created_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM wishlists w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.id WHERE w.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wishlists (member_id, product_id, created_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlists WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId}
